mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_notice ( receive_user_id, notice_type, related_id, notice_content, read_status ) VALUES
(#{notice.receiveUserId}, #{notice.noticeType}, #{notice.relatedId}, #{notice.noticeContent}, #{notice.readStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT sn.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM sys_notice sn LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sn.receive_user_id = u.user_id WHERE sn.notice_id = #{noticeId}
SELECT sn.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM sys_notice sn LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sn.receive_user_id = u.user_id WHERE sn.receive_user_id = #{receiveUserId} ORDER BY sn.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_notice WHERE receive_user_id = #{receiveUserId} AND read_status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_notice WHERE receive_user_id = #{receiveUserId} AND read_status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_notice SET read_status = 1 WHERE notice_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_notice WHERE receive_user_id = #{receiveUserId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_notice WHERE receive_user_id = #{receiveUserId} AND read_status = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_notice WHERE create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
